title: Houthis claim strikes on Saudi Arabian oil tankers as Rubio says Iran not ready to make a deal
summary_full: Yemen's Houthis said they had targeted two Saudi Arabian oil tankers with drones and missiles for allegedly violating its maritime blockade.
summary_public: Yemen's Houthis said they had targeted two Saudi Arabian oil tankers with drones and missiles for allegedly violating its maritime blockade.
